Rónin Wallet | The Axie Infinity Wallet

Rónin Wallet was founded in 2015; it is a very popular trading platform that offers to buy, sell and hold more than 80 cryptocurrencies, 27 different types of national currencies, 50 U.S. stocks, and four precious metals. Rónin can instantly convert fiat currency into cryptocurrency without fees, and the other exchanges would charge a fee for the same service. The interface of Rónin website and app is very user-friendly, and it also offers very beneficial security features that protect all the assets and information of users’ accounts. If you are completely new and want to access all assets of Rónin, then firstly, you will need to create your account on Rónin Wallet.

Methods To Install The Rónin Wallet App

  

Rónin Wallet provides a mobile wallet for Androidand iOS devices. A mobile wallet is very beneficial because it allows users to access their funds anywhere if they are away from their desktop or computer. To download its app, you have to follow these steps:

  • On your      mobile phone, open the application store.
  • Open the      Google Play Store if you      are an Android user.
  • Or open      an Apple Store if you are an iOS device user.
  • Type Rónin      in the search bar and press the search key.
  • Now you      will see the Rónin icon on your screen.
  • Click      the “Install” button next to      the Rónin Wallet icon.
  • After a      few minutes, the Rónin mobile wallet will be downloaded on your mobile.

Methods To Sign-Up On Rónin Wallet App

The signing up process of the Rónin platform is very straightforward and takes less time. Here are the easy steps that help you to start the profile creation process:

  • Open the      official site of Rónin Wallet on your browser.
  • If you      download the mobile wallet, then open it on your Android/iOS device.
  • On the      top-right side, click the “Sign-Up”      button.
  • The      registration form will appear on your device screen.
  • Enter      the email address you regularly check because Rónin sends all the      important alerts to this email address.
  • After      this, you have to create a strong password to protect your account. The      password should contain eight characters, and it must use one uppercase      character, one lowercase character, one number, or one special character.
  • Choose      your “Country Of Residence” and      press the “Next”      button.
  • On the      next screen, you need to provide your personal information like your name,      date of birth, state, etc.
  • Set a      username to your Rónin      Wallet account and hit the “Next” button.
  • After      submitting all the information, you will receive an email.
  • Click on      the “Confirmation Link” to      verify your email address.
  • Now,      enter your phone number to enable the 2FA.
  • To      complete the sign-up process, download the “Authy” app. This app      ensures that your Rónin      Wallet account remains secure with two-factor      authentication.
  • Enter      the same number in the Authy app for your Rónin registration process.
  • You will      get a security code; input this code on the sign-up page to complete the      process of registration.

Methods To Login On Rónin Account

  

After completing the sign-up procedure of the Rónin account, you can now log in easily and start trading. To do this, follow these steps:

  • Launch      the web browser of any device and go to the official website of Rónin      Wallet.
  • Alternatively,      Open the mobile app on your Android     and iOS device.
  • Click      the “Login in” button on the      upper-right side.
  • On the      login page, enter your email address and password that you use in the      registration process.
  • Tap on      the “Login” tab to finish the      process.


Methods to buy bitcoin via USD on Rónin Wallet?

  • Firstly,      log in to your account by entering your email address or password.
  • Find and      click the “Anything      To Anything” option.
  • Choose      where the funds will arise (linked bank account or credit/debit card).
  • Find and      select the “USD”      option.
  • Go to      the “To” field and choose the “Buy” option.
  • Click on      the “Preview Trade” button to      check the details.
  • Lastly,      click the “Complete”      or “Done” option.


Frequently Asked Questions

How is the Rónin a safe platform?

Rónin Wallet is a very secure platform because it has an intricate encryption system and also has a dedicated cybersecurity team that monitors the user’s accounts and transactions to make sure everything is safe.


What coins are supported on the Rónin exchange platform?

On the Rónin Wallet account, users can buy or sell XRP, Cardano: ADA, XLM, NEO DOGE, Axie, Sushiswap, and many more.


Is Rónin a trusted platform?

Yes! Rónin Wallet is a very safest and most trustworthy platform. It is transparent, Which allows users to verify their transaction flows, assets, obligations, and assets.
